name: In-Systcom Inc.
summary: In-Systcom Inc. provides interactive entertainment and communication solutions to the luxury resort, hotel, and timeshare markets. It manufactures the ResortLynx Infotainment System, which delivers video on demand, WiFi, and VoIP services. ResortLynx offers guest the movies, email and Internet, games, and guest messaging. The company's installations include properties in the Caribbean and the United States. In-Systcom Inc. was founded in 2000 and is based in Alpharetta, Georgia. On June 27, 2008, the voluntary petition of In-Systcom Inc. for reorganization under Chapter 11 was converted to Chapter 7. It had filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy on October 1, 2007. In-Systcom Inc. is in liquidation.
